basic_details.job_title: NAM Jharkhand Consultant NAM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years Age as on 01-08-2026. No age relaxation details are provided in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: BAMS/BUMS/BHMS/BSMS/BYNS, Minimum 3 years experience in Public Health Programmes
qualification.details: Consultant NAM (Technical) & Consultant NAM (Planning implementation & monitoring AAM - AYUSH): Minimum bachelor degree (BAMS/BUMS/BHMS/BSMS/BYNS) from a recognized university with a minimum of 03 years of working experience in Public Health Programmes of Government/PSUs or a reputed private organization. Knowledge of computers including MS Office is desirable. Preference will be given to candidates with PG Qualification in AYUSH stream.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Consultant NAM (Planning implementation & monitoring AAM - AYUSH)

selection_process: Document Verification Personal Interview Written Exam (if number of applicants increases)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NAM Jharkhand Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NAM Jharkhand to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Consultant NAM posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Consultant NAM posts is 20th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant NAM role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a minimum bachelor's degree in BAMS/BUMS/BHMS/BSMS/BYNS from a recognized university, along with at least 3 years of experience in Public Health Programmes.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant NAM recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Consultant NAM posts is between 21 years and 60 years as of 1st August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant NAM position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant NAM position in the National AYUSH Mission Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant NAM posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Consultant NAM posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1000.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC and ST candidates is also Rs. 1000.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant NAM recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, Personal Interview, and potentially a Written Exam if the number of applicants is high.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
